claim_text: Foliar NPK application to winter wheat efficient at BBCH 31

value.raw_value_text: The results of the conducted research indicate the high efficiency of the complex application of nitrogen-phosphorus-potassium fertilisers for foliar spraying of winter wheat plants at the stage of BBCH 31 both on the background of pre-sowing potassium fertilizers and without it
value.text_value: Foliar NPK application to winter wheat efficient at BBCH 31

provenance.evidence_text: The results of the conducted research indicate the high efficiency of the complex application of nitrogen-phosphorus-potassium fertilisers for foliar spraying of winter wheat plants at the stage of BBCH 31 both on the background of pre-sowing potassium fertilizers and without it

bbch_applicability.evidence_text: The results of the conducted research indicate the high efficiency of the complex application of nitrogen-phosphorus-potassium fertilisers for foliar spraying of winter wheat plants at the stage of BBCH 31 both on the background of pre-sowing potassium fertilizers and without it
